title: eulophia pyrophila
intro: Eulophia pyrophila, commonly known as the fire orchid, is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including the ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health due to its vasodilatory effects. The therapeutic actions of Eulophia pyrophila are attributed to its bioactive constituents, which include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds. However, I couldn't verify the specific bioactive constituents of this plant.

side_effects: Eulophia pyrophila can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, nausea, and diarrhea, particularly when ingested in large quantities.
